title: JetBrains Rider 教育使用例
description: 教育現場で JetBrains Rider を使ってプログラミング教育とコード学習を行います。

useCaseDetails.users: CS students, coding bootcamp learners, educators
useCaseDetails.workflow: Learning programming, completing assignments, building portfolio projects
useCaseDetails.benefits: Powerful learning environment with debugging and code completion
